parsing_approach: Real XML parse via xml.sax with a locator for line spans; external entity and DTD resolution disabled. Dispatches on the root element: <struts-config> yields Route nodes per action mapping (forwards, form bean, input, action class as properties, full element span) plus ConfigurationEntry nodes for form-beans, global-forwards, message-resources, and plug-ins; <form-validation> yields ConfigurationEntry nodes per validator field.
extracts: Route node per <action> with path, action class, form bean, scope, input, and all forwards (name/path/redirect/line)
ConfigurationEntry per validator <field> with form, property, depends
declares edges from the file node to every extracted construct
known_limitations: Struts 1.x vocabulary only; rejects XML whose root is not <struts-config> or <form-validation> rather than guessing.
Records configuration facts only: URL suffix derivation (e.g. '.do' from web.xml) and semantic interpretation are the graph builders' job.
SAX locator lines point at the end of the start tag; multi-line start tags report the closing line as the span start.
Validator <var>/<arg> details inside fields are not extracted, only form/property/depends.
